# Ramon Lamor

First mentioned: **3301-07-08**  
Last mentioned: **3301-07-24**  
Total mentions: **4**

## Related


## Biography

Ramon Lamor serves as Deputy Communications Officer of Humason Orbital in the Carns system. In July 3301, he announced ambitious plans to shift the system's economy from mining to high-tech operations after reports suggested mining would become uneconomical. Lamor outlined an extensive acquisition programme for robotics to support new product lines, which would replace both extraction and industrial concerns. He pledged financial and logistical support to existing businesses during the transition, framing the change as an opportunity for Carns to become a greater player in the regional economy.
